steps.title: Understand infinitely many solutions
steps.content: An equation has infinitely many solutions when it is an identity-when both sides of the equation are exactly the same expression. This means the equation is true for every possible value of the variable.

steps.title: Equate the constant terms
steps.content:
In the equation $7x + 23 = 7x + k$, the $7x$ terms are already identical on both sides. For the equation to hold for all values of $x$, the constant terms must also be equal:
$$23 = k$$
Therefore, $k = 23$.
